sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95992" key="spoggoqh/ras" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπογγο-θήρας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n95992.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">diver for sponges</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.950b</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">981e</biblScope> </bibl>:—hence <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen> </sense> </entryFree>
